title: Asian Shares Are Mixed as Tech Stocks Fall in Japan and South Korea
description: HONG KONG (AP) — Asian markets were mixed on Monday as selling of artificial intelligence-related shares pulled benchmarks in Japan and South Korea lower, though gains for other stocks helped offset those losses.
content:

title: Doctors thought it was asthma. AI flagged a serious heart problem.
description: Artificial intelligence (AI) programs can spot patterns in electrocardiograms that humans miss. Now, one program is going to be widely available – for free – to doctors.
content:
Artificial intelligence (AI) most likely saved Louie Quiros’ life.
Quiros, a 45-year-old caregiver and security guard, showed up at a New York City emergency room in February 2025. For the past four days, he said, he had been coughing up blood and fi... [4700 chars]

title: Investor Shift Boosts China and Hong Kong Stocks
description: China and Hong Kong stocks experienced a rise on Monday, primarily driven by gains in consumer and healthcare sectors. This increase occurred as investors shifted their focus from artificial intelligence supply-chain stocks to more traditional sectors, demonstrating changing investment strategies in the market.
content: On Monday, stocks in China and Hong Kong saw significant gains, with consumer and healthcare sectors leading the charge. This upward trend can be attributed to investors' strategic move away from artificial intelligence supply-chain names towards mor... [391 chars]
